# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservice-access-policy
  namespace: default # Replace with the actual namespace of your microservice
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice # Target the specific microservice instance(s)
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service-account"] # Allow traffic from frontend service account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/data", "/api/v1/status"] # Allow GET to specific paths
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service-account"] # Allow traffic from admin service account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/admin/*"] # Allow POST, PUT, DELETE to any path under /api/v1/admin
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/monitoring-service-account"] # Allow traffic from monitoring service account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/healthz", "/metrics"] # Allow GET to health and metrics endpoints
